text: A chair is a piece of furniture designed for one person to sit on
original_text: A chair is a piece of furniture designed for one person to sit on.

text: chairs usually have a seat, back, and legs
original_text: Chairs usually have a seat, back, and legs.

text: chairs can be made from wood, metal, plastic, fabric, or other materials
original_text: Chairs can be made from wood, metal, plastic, fabric, or other materials.

text: A good chair supports comfort, posture, and staying in one place
